meta.title: Canonical Source Registry
meta.policy: Only canonical_for_render entries may drive v1 template implementation. non_canonical_reference_only entries may inform structure. deny_for_seeding entries must never seed production records, company data, templates, or sequences.

locked_source_policy.historical_excel_policy: Excel lama reference only, bukan import production.
locked_source_policy.no_cross_company_numbering: Jangan campur numbering Wehdah, Persada, Virtue Damsel, Nas Ceria.
locked_source_policy.workspace_policy: Workspace asal kosong, bina sistem baru.

canonical_for_render.notes: Strongest Wehdah invoice plus artwork output target; 2 pages, page 1 invoice, page 2 artwork, 1020x1320 pt.
Wehdah Lao UI/Rockwell family; many artwork pages; A4 invoice plus artwork confirmation layouts.
Same Wehdah family; ARTWORK sheet has invoice and artwork continuation pages.

non_canonical_reference_only.source: A To Z sheets inside QUOTATION MUBZ workbooks
non_canonical_reference_only.use: Generic structure reference for DO, cash bill, PO, notes, official receipt, and payment voucher only.

canonical_for_render.notes: 8 sheets; NAS Ceria/Vertex42 style; Arial; item columns No, Item/Description, Qty, Rate, Amount.
20 sheets; visible and hidden sheets; quote/invoice/costing mixed; use quote/invoice layout only.

non_canonical_reference_only: Hidden sheets not confirmed as document templates
deny_for_seeding: Historical bare numbers such as 3118, 2291, 1292, and 3893

canonical_for_render.notes: Only INV 1 is canonical for Persada billing in this pack.

non_canonical_reference_only: Other workbook sheets containing A To Z, Virtue, or Wehdah data
deny_for_seeding: Any non-INV 1 sheet as Persada template truth
Mixed-company data inside the Persada workbook
Mixed Virtue sheets inside other company workbooks until confirmed
Generic A To Z as a real company
Generic A To Z numbering as production policy
